case_title: WOOD WENDY VS THE CAMBRIDGE FUND INC et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE CAMBRIDGE FUND INC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $112.00 FILED BY WOOD WENDY AS TO DEFENDANT THE CAMBRIDGE FUND INC SCOTT THOMAS C O CAMBRIDGE MANAGEMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOOD WENDY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE CAMBRIDGE FUND INC SCOTT THOMAS C O CAMBRIDGE MANAGEMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
